MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Merch Housing California is present. Represented by Margo Rodriguez.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carl Thompson is present.
Attorney David J. Miller representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-07-2011 is vacated.
